Molecular Sieve 5A

Adsorbents • Molecular Sieves

Adsorbents

Molecular Sieve 5A

5A molecular sieve is used where selective adsorption of linear hydrocarbons and moisture removal are required in one step.

Download DatasheetRequest TDS / CoA / Quote
Applications
Hydrocarbon separation, hydrogen purification, LPG drying
Typical Specifications
Aperture 5Å; selective adsorption for n-paraffins; stable adsorption profile
Grades / Forms
Beads, pellets
Technical Notes
Use where product separation and purification performance must be matched to process gas composition and cycle design.
Documentation
CoA, TDS, MSDS available on request
